sentences.text_original: 你最近在忙什么？好几天没看到你了。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuì jìn zài máng shén me? Hǎo jǐ tiān méi kàn dào nǐ le.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda nima bilan bandsan? Bir necha kundan beri ko'rmayapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Чем ты занят в последнее время? Несколько дней тебя не видел.
sentences.text_translation_en: What have you been busy with? I haven't seen you for several days.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我在准备HSK考试，下个月就要考了。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài zhǔn bèi HSK kǎo shì, xià ge yuè jiù yào kǎo le.
sentences.text_translation: HSK imtihoniga tayyorlanyapman, keyingi oy topshiraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я готовлюсь к экзамену HSK, в следующем месяце буду сдавать.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm preparing for the HSK exam — I'm taking it next month.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你报名考几级？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bào míng kǎo jǐ jí?
sentences.text_translation: Nechanchi darajaga ro'yxatdan o'tding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: На какой уровень ты записался?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which level did you sign up for?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 四级。我已经复习了两个多月了。
sentences.pinyin: Sì jí. Wǒ yǐ jīng fù xí le liǎng ge duō yuè le.
sentences.text_translation: To'rtinchi daraja. Ikki oydan ko'proq vaqtdan beri takrorlayapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Четвёртый уровень. Я уже повторяю больше двух месяцев.
sentences.text_translation_en: Level 4. I've already been reviewing for over two months.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你觉得难吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jué de nán ma?
sentences.text_translation: Senga qiyin tuyulyaptimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тебе кажется сложным?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you find it hard?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 听力和阅读还好，但是写作部分比较难。
sentences.pinyin: Tīng lì hé yuè dú hái hǎo, dàn shì xiě zuò bù fen bǐ jiào nán.
sentences.text_translation: Tinglash va o'qish qismi hali holva, lekin yozma qism ancha qiyin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Аудирование и чтение ничего, а вот письменная часть сложновата.
sentences.text_translation_en: Listening and reading are okay, but the writing section is rather hard.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你每天学习多长时间？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān xué xí duō cháng shí jiān?
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni qancha vaqt o'qiysan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько времени ты занимаешься каждый день?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long do you study each day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 一般两个小时，周末会多一些。
sentences.pinyin: Yì bān liǎng ge xiǎo shí, zhōu mò huì duō yì xiē.
sentences.text_translation: Odatda ikki soat, dam olish kunlari biroz ko'proq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Обычно два часа, по выходным побольше.
sentences.text_translation_en: Usually two hours, a bit more on weekends.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你用什么方法记单词？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yòng shén me fāng fǎ jì dān cí?
sentences.text_translation: So'zlarni yodlash uchun qanaqa usul ishlatasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Каким методом ты запоминаешь слова?
sentences.text_translation_en: What method do you use to memorize words?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我每天用手机软件背二十个新词，然后复习旧的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ měi tiān yòng shǒu jī ruǎn jiàn bèi èr shí ge xīn cí, rán hòu fù xí jiù de.
sentences.text_translation: Har kuni telefon ilovasi bilan yigirmata yangi so'z yodlayman, keyin eskilarini takrorlayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Каждый день учу двадцать новых слов в приложении, потом повторяю старые.
sentences.text_translation_en: Every day I memorize twenty new words with a phone app, then review the old ones.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这个方法有效吗？
sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge fāng fǎ yǒu xiào ma?
sentences.text_translation: Bu usul samaralimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Этот метод эффективен?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is this method effective?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 挺有效的。坚持了两个月，我的词汇量提高了很多。
sentences.pinyin: Tǐng yǒu xiào de. Jiān chí le liǎng ge yuè, wǒ de cí huì liàng tí gāo le hěn duō.
sentences.text_translation: Ancha samarali. Ikki oy sabot qildim, so'z boyligim ancha oshdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Довольно эффективен. За два месяца мой словарный запас сильно вырос.
sentences.text_translation_en: Quite effective. After two months of keeping at it, my vocabulary has grown a lot.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你有没有做模拟题？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu méi yǒu zuò mó nǐ tí?
sentences.text_translation: Sinov testlarini ishladingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты решал пробные задания?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you done any practice tests?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 做了。上周做了一套，结果还不错。
sentences.pinyin: Zuò le. Shàng zhōu zuò le yí tào, jié guǒ hái bú cuò.
sentences.text_translation: Ishladim. O'tgan hafta bitta to'plamni ishladim, natija yomon emas edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Решал. На прошлой неделе прошёл один комплект, результат неплохой.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have. Last week I did one set, and the result was pretty good.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你应该没问题！
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ yīng gāi méi wèn tí!
sentences.text_translation: Unda muammo bo'lmasa kerak!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда у тебя точно всё получится!
sentences.text_translation_en: Then you should be fine!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 希望如此。考完以后我打算去中国留学。
sentences.pinyin: Xī wàng rú cǐ. Kǎo wán yǐ hòu wǒ dǎ suàn qù Zhōng guó liú xué.
sentences.text_translation: Shunday bo'lsa edi. Imtihondan keyin Xitoyga o'qishga bormoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Надеюсь. После экзамена я собираюсь поехать учиться в Китай.
sentences.text_translation_en: I hope so. After the exam I plan to go study in China.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 真的吗？太好了！你想去哪个城市？
sentences.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Tài hǎo le! Nǐ xiǎng qù nǎ ge chéng shì?
sentences.text_translation: Rostdanmi? Juda yaxshi! Qaysi shaharga bormoqchisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Правда? Отлично! В какой город ты хочешь поехать?
sentences.text_translation_en: Really? That's great! Which city do you want to go to?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我想去北京。那边的大学很有名。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù Běi jīng. Nà biān de dà xué hěn yǒu míng.
sentences.text_translation: Pekinga bormoqchiman. U yerdagi universitetlar juda mashhur.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хочу в Пекин. Тамошние университеты очень известные.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to go to Beijing. The universities there are very famous.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 祝你考试顺利！也祝你申请成功！
sentences.pinyin: Zhù nǐ kǎo shì shùn lì! Yě zhù nǐ shēn qǐng chéng gōng!
sentences.text_translation: Imtihoning muvaffaqiyatli o'tsin! Arizang ham qabul bo'lsin!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Желаю тебе сдать экзамен! И чтобы заявку одобрили!
sentences.text_translation_en: Good luck with your exam! And good luck with your application!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢！如果我考过了，我请你吃饭！
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie! Rú guǒ wǒ kǎo guò le, wǒ qǐng nǐ chī fàn!
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat! Agar imtihondan o'tsam, seni ovqatga taklif qilaman!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо! Если сдам, угощу тебя обедом!
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks! If I pass, I'll treat you to a meal!
sentences.speaker: B
